# Milestone Development

Milestone Development provides premium residential, commercial, industrial, renovation, design and construct, management services, and home and land package support.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://milestonedevelopment.com.au/): Construction services, project categories, process, team, and enquiry form.
- [Residential](https://milestonedevelopment.com.au/residential-construction.html): Custom homes, townhouses, and residential builds.
- [Commercial](https://milestonedevelopment.com.au/commercial-construction.html): Commercial construction, office, and fitout delivery.
- [Industrial](https://milestonedevelopment.com.au/industrial-construction.html): Warehouse, logistics, and industrial facilities.
- [Management Services](https://milestonedevelopment.com.au/management-services.html): Project planning, coordination, and builder-led delivery oversight.
- [Contact](https://milestonedevelopment.com.au/contact.html): Project enquiry details and phone contact.

## Services

- Residential construction
- Commercial construction
- Industrial construction
- Renovations
- Design and construct
- Management services
- Home and land packages

## Contact

Phone: 1800 008 883
